feedback: The pricng at Rs 399 is standard across the industry right now. Cannot say it is particularly cheap or expensive compared to competitors. It sits in the middle where most consumers find it acceptable without being excited or disappointed by the cost.
Average pricng for average servce.

Every operator raised prices this year but this one went furthest from Rs 299 to Rs 899 without adding any new features or improving coverage. The price increase is pure profit grab with zero customer benefit. I can comfortably recommend this pricing to friends and family.

The pricing on this operator is genuinely competitive and fair for what they deliver. At Rs 149 per month I get everything I need including good data and calls without feeling overcharged. Compared to competitors charging Rs 699 for similar features this is easily the most affordable option.

I switched primarily because of aggressive pricng. At Rs 199 I get comparable or better service than what I was paying Rs 799 for previously. The savings add up significantly over a year without any compromise in actual service quality delivered.

At Rs 249 the pricing is standard. Competitors charge similar amounts for similar features. No one is significantly cheaper or more expensive at this service level. The market has converged on a narrow price band. For the features included this pricing is hard to beat.
Standard pricing and plans also average.
expensve but fast speed and solid covrage.
Pricing standard but billing has errors.
Good price at Rs 149 but calls drop.

I switched primarily because of aggressive pricing. At Rs 199 I get comparable or better service than what I was paying Rs 499 for previously. The savings add up significantly over a year without any compromise in actual service quality delivered.

The constant price increases have made this operator unaffordable for budget users like me in Vijayawada. Every quarter they hike prices without adding features. Rs 899 for basic connectivity is simply too much for millions of Indians. Compared to what competitors charge this is significantly better.
Expensive but fast speed and solid covrage in Salem.

Pricing on this plan is neither competitive nor overpriced. At Rs 249 it is roughly what you would expect for this tier of service from any major operator today. No strong feelings either way about the cost. I appreciate honest straightforward pricing without hidden fees.

The Rs 219 pricing is budget friendly which is great but the internet speed and data balance are both disappointing. Cheap does not mean good value when the actual service quality is poor. The cost transparency builds genuine trust with customers.
Rs 129 plan is a steal honestly.
Affordable pricing and great value for money.
Average rates but support is terrible.
Standard pricng average speed typical coverage.

Standard Rs 249 pricing with average speed and typical coverage in Warangal. Nothing about cost performance or reach stands out. Thoroughly average economics across the board. The affordability here does not come at the cost of quality.

The Rs 799 plan is outrageously priced for what it delivers in Bandra. Slow internet frequent drops and mediocre calls do not justify premium pricing. Paying luxury prices for economy service is the daily reality here. Compared to what competitors charge this is significantly better.

The pricing on this operator has become absolutely ridiculous after the recent tariff hike. I was paying Rs 299 six months ago for the same plan that now costs Rs 899 with no improvement in service. This is pure corporate greed at the expense of customers.

Pricing on this plan is neither competitive nor overpriced. At Rs 349 it is roughly what you would expect for this tier of service from any major operator today. No strong feelings either way about the cost. This pricing makes budget planning straightforward for me.
pricng competitive. Better than all other operators.

The Rs 349 price point is average for the Indian telecom market. Not the cheapest option but also not outrageously expensive. For someone who does not want to spend time comparing plans it is an acceptable middle ground. The affordability here does not come at the cost of quality.
Very affordable pricing at Rs 99. Happy.

The Rs 99 pricng is budget friendly which is great but the intrenet speed and data balance are both disappointing. Cheap does not mean good value when the actual service quality is poor. The pricing structure works well for different budget levels.

The pricing on this operator is genuinely competitive and fair for what they deliver. At Rs 179 per month I get everything I need including good data and calls without feeling overcharged. Compared to competitors charging Rs 899 for similar features this is easily the most affordable option.
Rs 299 is market rate. Nothing special.
Good rates for the features provided.
rs 349 is normal and calls r okay
pricng makes this operator uncompetitive now.

Cheap plan but slow speed and low data.

Best prices in the market at Rs 179.

I calculated my annual telecom spend and switching to this operator at Rs 129 saves me nearly thirty percent compared to my previous plan at Rs 999. Same features lower cost. The math speaks for itself. I appreciate honest straightforward pricing without hidden fees.
Pricing makes this the smart economic choice.

The annual cost at Rs 1199 per recharge works out to nearly double what my colleague pays for comparable service. When I bring up pricing with support they quote official rates with no flexibility or loyalty discounts offered. The cost transparency builds genuine trust with customers.
Rates going up but service staying same.
Standard pricng and plans also average in Chennai.
Standard pricing average speed typical coverage in Bandra.
Affordable plan with generous data balance.
Average cost but coverage is great.

The affordability of this operator is what initially attracted me and keeps me loyal. Rs 149 for the full package of calls data and messaging is fair pricing. They manage to keep costs low without sacrificing service quality which is rare among operators.

I am extremely unhappy with the pricing structure. The Rs 999 plan is significantly more expensive than what competitors offer for identical features. For the same money I could get twice the data and longer validity elsewhere. Feeling trapped. For the features included this pricing is hard to beat.

Rs 799 is too expensve and the intrenet speed is also terrible in Surat. Paying more for less makes this the worst deal available in the market currently. I appreciate honest straightforward pricing without hidden fees.
